generated_comment: Arre yaar, har baat pe itna moral science kyun 😅 office, traffic, match, sab jagah log woh BC/MC type words bas expression mein bol dete hain, kisi ki maa-behen ko literally thodi bol rahe. Itna serious loge toh normal baat bhi issue lagne lagegi.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it normalizes female-body/chastity-rooted abuse as harmless 'expression' and dismisses concern about its misogynistic structure. It encodes the 'it's just a word' defense and the everyday normalization of gendered gaalis in male youth culture.
original_frame: Workplace: Menstrual and Maternity Leave Bias
persona_text: You are Mohit. Age 23. A fresher at an e-commerce startup in Delhi. You are in your company's unofficial male only WhatsApp group created by colleagues for after-hours chat. Someone just shared a meme making fun of the new period leave policy. You are reacting to the meme and adding your own comment.
